title: StrategySpec
description: Strategy specification for backtesting and paper trading

strategy_id.description: Unique identifier for this strategy, e.g. qqq_collar_weekly_v1

universe.description: List of underlying tickers this strategy trades

legs.description: Explicit leg definitions (optional; used when structure requires detail)

entry_rules.description: Conditions and procedures for entering the strategy

exit_rules.description: Conditions and procedures for exiting the strategy

objective.description: Plain-language statement of the strategy's purpose and expected behavior

assumptions.description: Market conditions the strategy assumes will hold; state what would invalidate the strategy

max_loss_per_trade_pct.description: Max loss per trade as % of account

min_credit_per_cycle_pct.description: Min required premium as % of notional

max_position_notional.description: Max notional size per position in USD

best_environment.description: Market regime where this strategy performs best

default_parameters.description: Default numeric parameters for entry/exit rules
